title: Compliance Retainer
metaDescription: Fixed-fee monthly legal advisory retainer in Vietnam — ongoing compliance support that acts as your in-house legal team.

hero.title: Compliance retainer services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Fixed-fee legal advisory that gives SMEs and foreign investors the benefits of an in-house legal team — without the cost of hiring full-time staff.

sections.heading: Your on-call legal team in Vietnam
body: Staying compliant in Vietnam means keeping pace with frequent changes in tax, labour and corporate governance rules. InCorp Vietnam's Compliance Retainer is a monthly, fixed-fee legal advisory service designed for SMEs and foreign direct investors who need dependable guidance without the expense of a permanent legal hire.
Acting as your in-house legal partner, we provide proactive monitoring and timely advice so potential issues are addressed before they escalate.

sections.heading: Inside the retainer
items: Compliance advice and memos tailored to your business situation
Multiple communication channels — email, phone calls and document exchanges
In-person consultations at your office when needed
Proactive regulatory monitoring across tax, labour law and corporate governance
Ad-hoc updates on significant legal changes affecting your operations

items.title: Cost Savings
items.desc: A fixed monthly fee costs far less than hiring permanent legal staff.

items.title: Consistent Oversight
items.desc: Continuous compliance monitoring reduces the risk of non-compliance.

items.title: Dedicated Expertise
items.desc: A legal partner who knows your business and acts as your in-house team.

items.title: Proactive Risk Management
items.desc: Issues are identified and addressed before they escalate.

items.title: Submit information
items.desc: Share your company details and compliance needs.

items.title: Consult our advisors
items.desc: Meet with our bilingual business advisors to scope the retainer.

items.title: Verify documents
items.desc: We complete KYC verification and onboard your business.

items.title: Begin your retainer
items.desc: Select your plan and start receiving ongoing compliance support.

items.q: What areas does the retainer cover?
items.a: The retainer typically covers tax, labour and corporate governance compliance, with the scope tailored to your business.

items.q: How often do we check in?
items.a: Frequency is customisable — commonly monthly or quarterly check-ins, plus immediate updates whenever regulations change.

sections.title: Ready for dependable compliance support?
sections.subtitle: Let our advisors act as your in-house legal team in Vietnam.
